name: Excessive Use of SC Command
notes: This rule triggers when the command sc is executed on mulitple hosts.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created
when the event matches Process Name IMATCHES 'sc\.exe' AQL filter query
when at least 25 events are seen with the same Source IP in 3 minutes
thresholds: when at least 25 events are seen with the same Source IP in 3 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Excessive Use of SC Command on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create, (5000862) Success Audit: A new process has been created
AND when the event matches Process Name IMATCHES 'sc\.exe' AQL filter query
AND when at least 25 events are seen with the same Source IP in 3 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Detected Excessive Execution of SC Command
Event description: Detected Excessive Execution of SC Command
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
